pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicitly require this path.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly require this path.
Extracted from task.json description instructions and matched with verifier logic.
verifier.py checks for eddx_size > 5000, contradicting the metadata claim of 10000.
verifier.py checks for png_size > 10000, contradicting the metadata claim of 50000.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a Business Model Canvas for a fictional SaaS product. Required output paths are /home/ga/Documents/fraud_shield_bmc.eddx and /home/ga/Documents/fraud_shield_bmc.png, correctly matching task instructions. The required strings exactly correspond to the prompt`s specific sections. The metadata claims for minimum file sizes are contradicted by verifier.py, which requires an EDDX size > 5000 bytes (not 10000) and a PNG size > 10000 bytes (not 50000).
